laws.title: Kentucky Minimum Wage — Federal $7.25/hr
laws.summary: Kentucky has not enacted a state minimum wage above the federal $7.25/hour. Kentucky is an at-will employment state with limited state-level protections beyond federal law.
compliance_actions: Comply with federal minimum wage ($7.25/hr) — no higher state rate applies
Kentucky has no state paid family leave or paid sick leave law — FMLAtis the floor
Review federal law requirements (ADA, Title VII, FMLA) which apply to Kentucky employees
